title: sunhangia calliantha
intro: Sunhangia calliantha, also known as the desert lavender, is a perennial shrub native to the Australian outback. Its medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Sunhangia calliantha include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of depression. Herbal preparations of Sunhangia calliantha include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
